nodes.label: OWASP Top 10 2021 Systematic Verification Tests — SEC-07  Each test class maps t
Build a minimal AsyncMock database for auth tests.
Context manager that patches database.db, routes.auth.db, and     auth_utils int
Create a valid JWT signed with a test secret.
OWASP A01 2021: Broken Access Control      Verify that unauthenticated users can
GET /api/auth/me without Bearer token must return 401.
Bearer token with garbage value must return 401, not 500.
OWASP A02 2021: Cryptographic Failures      Verify passwords are stored as bcryp
Registration must store hashed_password as a bcrypt hash (starts with $2b$),
create_access_token() in auth_utils must produce a JWT with alg=HS256.         T
The session_token cookie set on login must have the HttpOnly flag.         HttpO
encrypt_token() must produce output that differs from the plaintext input.
OWASP A03 2021: Injection      Verify NoSQL injection payloads are rejected at t
POST /api/auth/login with email={"$gt":""} is rejected with 422.
POST /api/auth/login with password={"$ne":""} must NOT return 200.
Static assertion: auth.py must NOT use f-strings or .format() inside         db.
OWASP A04 2021: Insecure Design      Verify password policy enforces strong pass
PasswordPolicy.validate() rejects password without uppercase letter.
PasswordPolicy.validate() rejects password without a digit.
OWASP A05 2021: Security Misconfiguration      Verify security headers are prese
A 404 response to a non-existent route must still include security headers.
Pydantic validation errors (422) must also include security headers.
decode_token() must raise JWTError when jwt_secret_key is empty.         This pr
SecurityConfig.validate() returns warnings for short JWT secrets.
OWASP A07 2021: Identification and Authentication Failures      Verify login err
Login with a non-existent email must return "Invalid email or password",
Login with correct email but wrong password must return the SAME error         m
A user registered via Google OAuth who tries email/password login         must r
Registering with an already-existing email returns 400 "Email already registered
OWASP A08 2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures      Verify Stripe webhooks
POST /api/billing/webhook/stripe without Stripe-Signature header         must re
Static assertion: billing.py webhook handler checks for stripe_signature
OWASP A09 2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures      Verify that failed
middleware/security.py must configure a module-level logger.         This is the
RateLimitMiddleware logs a warning when a rate limit is exceeded.         This e
Verify the login route raises 401 with "Invalid email or password" — the
routes/auth.py must import the logging module (prerequisite for audit logging).
